productName: SPR - 1g LIVE RESIN Vape Cart - Citrus Mistress
description: A hybrid live resin cartridge filled with fresh-frozen Citrus Mistress extract — all the bright, strain-true terpenes of live resin in a no-torch, push-button vape. Portable premium, a bright, zesty citrus flavor, leading into a smooth, well-rounded vibe.
